Tham Lao · อักษรธรรมลาว

materials.label: Mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา

samples: Atanatinya sut, Mahasamainya sut, Thammacakk sut cabap puca patalakkhana
Sap sut mon, Nam sap mahasamai
Sut sip ha wan tang tae nyesanta thoeng mahasamainya sut

lede: Mahāsamaya Sutta accounts for 14 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (36% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Nan and Wiang Sa District. Nearly all (93%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (86%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (14%). Dated witnesses run 1792–1894 CE (9 of 14 carry a date).

connections.label: Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก
